Sarah Johnson
Dallas, TX

Summary:
Dedicated and experienced warehouse associate with over three years of experience in fast-paced environments. Proficient in using RF scanners and handling inventory management systems. Proven ability to lift heavy items (up to 75 lbs) and work collaboratively in a team setting. Committed to maintaining a safe and organized workplace while meeting productivity goals.

Experience:

Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Dallas, TX  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operate RF scanners to track inventory and shipments, ensuring accuracy and timely processing of goods.  
- Perform daily inventory counts and assist in receiving and storing products, maintaining a clean and organized warehouse environment.  
- Collaborate with team members to meet daily shipping targets, consistently exceeding productivity benchmarks by 15%.

Warehouse Technician  
XYZ Distribution, Dallas, TX  
March 2019 - May 2021  
- Managed loading and unloading of trucks, utilizing proper lifting techniques to handle items weighing up to 50 lbs.  
- Assisted in training new staff on warehouse procedures, RF scanner operation, and safety protocols.  
- Participated in regular safety drills, contributing to a 20% reduction in workplace incidents.
